name: Coffee Day Enterprises Limited
summary: Coffee Day Enterprises Limited primarily operates Caf√É¬© Coffee Day outlets in India, Europe, the Americas, the Asia Pacific, Oceania, and internationally. It operates through Coffee and Related Business, Integrated Multimodal Logistics, Financial Services, Leasing of Commercial Office Space, Hospitality Services, and Investment and Other segments. The company operates a network of 1,192 caf√É¬© outlets under the Caf√É¬© Coffee Day brand in 208 cities; 412 CCD Value Express kiosks; and 58,697 vending machines in corporate workplaces and hotels, as well as markets coffee beans and powder through its 370 Fresh and Ground Coffee retail stores. It also provides integrated logistics services, such as port handling, road and rail, logistics, container freight stations, mining, and transportation. In addition, the company develops technology parks/SEZs, as well as offers geospatial, consultancy, and information technology (IT)/IT-enabled services (ITeS). Further, it owns and operates three luxury boutique resorts located in Chikmagalur, Bandipur, and Kabini, Karnataka under The Serai brand; and invests in IT/ITeS. Additionally, the company is involved in power generation activities. Coffee Day Enterprises Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Bengaluru, India.
